title: ozothamnus plumeus
intro: Ozothamnus plumeus, also known as the white smoke bush, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ozothamnus plumeus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be infused in hot water to create a tea, or its essential oil can be extracted and used in aromatherapy.
